title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: Tel Aviv / New York (with global teams)
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS company trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine, reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling RevOps beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, including collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri is an excellent match: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience exceeds the 7+ year requirement, deep Salesforce expertise aligns perfectly, fintech/cloud infrastructure domain experience (Finout is cloud cost management), and proven ability to scale RevOps operations. Tel Aviv HQ with remote flexibility matches his location preferences precisely.
ai_opener: I've followed Finout's impressive trajectory scaling with enterprise brands like NYT and Lyft, and your cloud cost-management GTM motion resonates with my 15 years building RevOps engines in fast-scaling B2B SaaS and fintech. Having scaled revenue operations through $30M+ ARR checkpoints with deep Salesforce expertise and cross-functional leadership, I'm interested in exploring how I can build and operationalize Finout's next growth phase reporting to your CRO.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence platform, is hiring a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy and operations. The role partners with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions, conduct quantitative analyses, and redesign territory models for global scalability. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS GTM models and segmentation, strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Exceptional match—RevOps Manager role aligns perfectly with Omri's GTM and territory optimization expertise, and Gong's revenue intelligence platform directly supports the analytical, Salesforce-centric work he excels at. Remote US role is accessible from his approved locations.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building scalable GTM operations in B2B SaaS, and I've always admired how Gong uses data to help revenue teams operate smarter. Your Territory Strategy & Operations role caught my attention because territory modeling and pipeline forecasting are exactly where I've driven the biggest impact—I'd love to bring that lens to Gong's own operations and help you scale globally.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: Warp is hiring its first Revenue Operations leader to work across Sales, Marketing, Growth, and Product to ensure the funnel is predictable, efficient, and scalable. You'll inherit a stack built by a fractional RevOps agency, own it, and level it up. Responsibilities include lead routing/enrichment, building conversion workflows, owning lead scoring, assignment rules and SLAs, and working with Product and Growth to operationalize PQL scoring, usage-based triggers, and automated outreach to turn self-serve users into enterprise opportunities.
score_reason: Near-perfect match: first RevOps leader role at a growth-stage company, core competencies in lead routing, scoring, workflows, and PQL operationalization align directly with Omri's GTM expertise. Remote US/Canada location is acceptable globally.
ai_opener: Warp's building something interesting in developer tooling, and I noticed you're looking for your first RevOps leader to operationalize the handoff between self-serve and enterprise sales. That PQL-to-AE motion is exactly what I've scaled at multiple B2B SaaS companies—turning product usage into predictable pipeline through lead scoring, assignment rules, and automated workflows. I'd be interested in exploring how I could help you level up the stack your fractional agency built and own the revenue engine as you scale.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: VulnCheck seeks a Revenue Operations Manager with 4+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Systems within a B2B SaaS environment. Requires hands-on Salesforce administration (object design, workflow automation, validation rules, reporting, data governance) or HubSpot expertise (lifecycle stages, lead scoring, automation). The role builds executive-level dashboards covering pipeline health, conversion rates, forecasting, bookings, and churn/expansion, and requires strong knowledge of SaaS metrics like ARR, ACV, NRR, and sales velocity.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience far exceeds 4+ year requirement, deep Salesforce/HubSpot expertise, proven track record building executive dashboards and SaaS metrics frameworks (ARR/ACV/NRR/pipeline forecasting). Remote US role aligns perfectly with location flexibility.
ai_opener: Omri—I came across VulnCheck's Revenue Operations Manager opening and saw a direct alignment with your background. You've spent 15 years building scalable GTM infrastructure in B2B SaaS, and your expertise in Salesforce administration, pipeline forecasting, and SaaS metrics frameworks (ARR/NRR/CAC-LTV) is exactly what VulnCheck needs to drive revenue acceleration as you scale. I'd love to explore how your experience could impact their growth trajectory.

title: Revenue Operations Manager

Requires a solid analytical foundation (Excel modeling, BI tools like Looker or Power BI), experience partnering with VPs and senior stakeholders, global scope, and a track record of turning operational data into GTM strategy and ICP/segmentation decisions.

Real estate SaaS is a new vertical, but the operational fundamentals (CRM, reporting, ICP segmentation, stakeholder management) are directly transferable from Omri's B2B SaaS background.

Re-Leased's move toward data-driven GTM strategy resonates with my philosophy that RevOps should sit at the center of revenue growth, not just maintain the pipes.

title: GTM Automation Engineer
